Localization.Description: A file with a suspicious extension was created on behalf of an instant messenger or email program, or malicious file activity was detected. This may indicate a phishing attack or malware being delivered to user's computer.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Instant messenger process {subject.process.name} on behalf of user {subject.account.name} created file "{object.name}" with a suspicious extension on host {event_src.host}
Suspicious activity of file "{object.name}" created by email process {subject.process.name} on behalf of user {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Event context: {datafield11}.

Suspicious activity of file "{object.name}" created by instant messenger process {subject.process.name} on behalf of user {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Event context: {datafield11}.
Email process {subject.process.name} on behalf of user {subject.account.name} created file "{object.name}" with a suspicious extension on host {event_src.host}
